report.technical_description:
Scope: main (main)
  Reads from scopes: cte:ReferralDenials, cte:AugDenialSla, cte:ReferralHistoryItemValues, cte:AugHistorySla
  Columns:
    - REFERRAL_ID: rd.[REFERRAL_ID]
    - COVERAGE_ID: rd.[COVERAGE_ID]
    - ENTRY_DATE: rd.[ENTRY_DATE]
    - START_DATE: rd.[START_DATE]
    - PRIORITY: rd.[PRIORITY]
    - REFERRAL_PROV_ID: rd.[REFERRAL_PROV_ID]
    - REFERRING_PROV_ID: rd.[REFERRING_PROV_ID]
    - AUTH_REQUEST_ID: aug.AUTH_REQUEST_ID
    - AUG_RECEIVED_DTTM: aug.AUG_RECEIVED_DTTM
    - LOB_ID: aug.LOB_ID
    - RFL_TYPE_C: aug.RFL_TYPE_C
    - ITEM_CHANGE: rhiv.ITEM_CHANGE
    - NEW_VALUE_EXTERNAL: rhiv.NEW_VALUE_EXTERNAL
    - ACTION_DTTM: rhiv.ACTION_DTTM
    - DENIAL_ROW: ahs.DENIAL_ROW
    - DENIAL_DATE: ahs.DENIAL_DATE
    - DENIAL_REASON: ahs.DENIAL_REASON
    - RFI_ROW: ahs.RFI_ROW
    - RFI_DATE: ahs.RFI_DATE

Scope: cte:ReferralDenials (cte)
  Reads from tables: V_CCHP_AuthHeader_Fact, REFERRAL_HIST, REFERRAL_BED_DAY
  Filters:
    - [where] 0 = 0
    - [where] EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM Clarity.dbo.REFERRAL_HIST AS RFLH WHERE RFLH.REFERRAL_ID = RFL.Referralid AND RFLH.NEW_RFL_STATUS_C = 5 UNION ALL SELECT 1 FROM Clarity.dbo.REFERRAL_BED_DAY AS RFLBD WHERE RFL.Referralid = RFLBD.REFERRAL_ID AND RFLBD.BED_DAY_STATUS_C = 2 )
  Columns:
    - REFERRAL_ID: V_CCHP_AuthHeader_Fact.Referralid
    - BedDayAuthRequestId: V_CCHP_AuthHeader_Fact.BedDayAuthRequestId
    - REFERRAL_EXT_ID: V_CCHP_AuthHeader_Fact.Externalid
    - COVERAGE_ID: V_CCHP_AuthHeader_Fact.Coverageid
    - ENTRY_DATE: V_CCHP_AuthHeader_Fact.EntryDate
    - START_DATE: V_CCHP_AuthHeader_Fact.StartDate
    - PRIORITY: V_CCHP_AuthHeader_Fact.ReferralPriority
    - RFL_LOB_ID: V_CCHP_AuthHeader_Fact.ReferralLineOfBusinessId
    - REFERRAL_PROV_ID: V_CCHP_AuthHeader_Fact.ReferralProviderId
    - REFERRING_PROV_ID: V_CCHP_AuthHeader_Fact.ReferringProviderId
    - RFL_TYPE_C: V_CCHP_AuthHeader_Fact.ReferralTypeCategory
    - CustomEntryDateTime: V_CCHP_AuthHeader_Fact.CustomEntryDateTime

Scope: exists:0 (exists)
  Reads from tables: REFERRAL_HIST
  Filters:
    - [where] RFLH.REFERRAL_ID = RFL.Referralid
    - [where] RFLH.NEW_RFL_STATUS_C = 5
  Columns:
    - 1: 1

Scope: exists:1 (exists)
  Reads from tables: REFERRAL_BED_DAY
  Filters:
    - [where] RFL.Referralid = RFLBD.REFERRAL_ID
    - [where] RFLBD.BED_DAY_STATUS_C = 2
  Columns:
    - 1: 1

Scope: cte:AugDenialSla (cte)
  Reads from tables: V_CCHP_UMAuthorizationRequest_Fact, REFERRAL, V_CCHP_UMAuthorizationRequestStatusHistory_Fact
  Filters:
    - [where] 0 = 0
    - [where] EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM CookClarity.Reporting.V_CCHP_UMAuthorizationRequestStatusHistory_Fact AS aughx WHERE aughx.AUTH_REQUEST_ID = aug.AUTH_REQUEST_ID AND aughx.UM_STATUS_C = 5 )
  Columns:
    - AUTH_REQUEST_ID: V_CCHP_UMAuthorizationRequest_Fact.AUTH_REQUEST_ID
    - AUTH_REQUEST_EXTERNAL_ID: V_CCHP_UMAuthorizationRequest_Fact.AUTH_REQUEST_EXTERNAL_ID
    - REFERRAL_ID: V_CCHP_UMAuthorizationRequest_Fact.REFERRAL_ID
    - COVERAGE_ID: V_CCHP_UMAuthorizationRequest_Fact.COVERAGE_ID
    - AUG_RECEIVED_DTTM: V_CCHP_UMAuthorizationRequest_Fact.AUG_RECEIVED_DTTM
    - START_DATE: COALESCE(aug.START_DATE, rfl.[START_DATE]) AS [START_DATE] /* may */
    - PRIORITY: V_CCHP_UMAuthorizationRequest_Fact.PRIORITY
    - LOB_ID: V_CCHP_UMAuthorizationRequest_Fact.LOB_ID
    - REFERRAL_PROV_ID: REFERRAL.REFERRAL_PROV_ID
    - REFERRING_PROV_ID: REFERRAL.REFERRING_PROV_ID
    - RFL_TYPE_C: V_CCHP_UMAuthorizationRequest_Fact.RFL_TYPE_C

Scope: cte:AugHistorySla (cte)
  Reads from scopes: cte:AugDenialSla
  Reads from tables: V_CCHP_UMAuthorization_Fact, V_CCHP_UMAuthorizationHistory_Fact
  Filters:
    - [where] authx.UM_STATUS = 'Denied' OR (authx.UM_STATUS = 'Pending Review' AND authx.UM_PENDING_RSN = 'HP Request for Information')
  Columns:
    - UM_AUTH_REQUEST_ID: V_CCHP_UMAuthorization_Fact.UM_AUTH_REQUEST_ID
    - CHANGED_BY_USER_ID: V_CCHP_UMAuthorizationHistory_Fact.CHANGED_BY_USER_ID
    - DENIAL_ROW: ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY aut.UM_AUTH_REQUEST_ID ORDER BY IIF(authx.UM_STATUS = 'Denied', authx.CHANGED_DTTM, '99991231')) AS [DENIAL_ROW]
    - DENIAL_DATE: IIF(authx.UM_STATUS = 'Denied', authx.CHANGED_DTTM, NULL) AS [DENIAL_DATE]
    - DENIAL_REASON: IIF(authx.UM_STATUS = 'Denied', authx.UM_DENIED_RSN, NULL) AS [DENIAL_REASON]
    - RFI_ROW: ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY aut.UM_AUTH_REQUEST_ID ORDER BY IIF(authx.UM_PENDING_RSN = 'HP Request for Information', authx.CHANGED_DTTM, '99991231')) AS [RFI_ROW]
    - RFI_DATE: IIF(authx.UM_PENDING_RSN = 'HP Request for Information', authx.CHANGED_DTTM, NULL) AS [RFI_DATE]
    - UM_STATUS: V_CCHP_UMAuthorizationHistory_Fact.UM_STATUS
    - CHANGED_DTTM: V_CCHP_UMAuthorizationHistory_Fact.CHANGED_DTTM
    - UM_DENIED_RSN: V_CCHP_UMAuthorizationHistory_Fact.UM_DENIED_RSN
    - UM_PENDING_RSN: V_CCHP_UMAuthorizationHistory_Fact.UM_PENDING_RSN

Scope: cte:ReferralHistoryItemValues (cte)
  Reads from scopes: cte:ReferralDenials
  Reads from tables: REFERRAL_HISTORY, RFL_HX_ACT, RFL_HX_ITEM_CHANGE, RFL_HX_NEW_VAL
  Filters:
    - [join_on] RFLHA.REFERRAL_ID = RFLH.REFERRAL_ID AND RFLHA.GROUP_LINE = RFLH.LINE
    - [join_on] RFLHIC.REFERRAL_ID = RFLHA.REFERRAL_ID AND RFLHIC.GROUP_LINE = RFLHA.GROUP_LINE AND RFLHIC.VALUE_LINE = RFLHA.VALUE_LINE AND RFLHIC.ITEM_CHANGE IN (50 , 18007 , 18003 , 2081 , 2080 )
    - [join_on] RFLHNV.REFERRAL_ID = RFLHA.REFERRAL_ID AND RFLHNV.GROUP_LINE = RFLHA.GROUP_LINE AND RFLHNV.VALUE_LINE = RFLHA.VALUE_LINE AND ((RFLHIC.ITEM_CHANGE = 18007 AND NOT RFLHNV.NEW_VAL IS NULL) OR (RFLHIC.ITEM_CHANGE = 18003 AND RFLHNV.NEW_VAL = 1640000010 ) OR (RFLHIC.ITEM_CHANGE = 50 AND RFLHNV.NEW_VAL = '5' ) OR (RFLHIC.ITEM_CHANGE = 2081 AND RFLHNV.NEW_VAL = '2' ) OR (RFLHIC.ITEM_CHANGE = 2080 AND NOT RFLHNV.NEW_VAL IS NULL))
  Columns:
    - REFERRAL_ID: REFERRAL_HISTORY.REFERRAL_ID
    - HX_USER_ID: REFERRAL_HISTORY.HX_USER_ID
    - ACTION_DTTM: RFL_HX_ACT.ACTION_DTTM
    - GROUP_LINE: RFL_HX_ACT.GROUP_LINE
    - ITEM_CHANGE: RFL_HX_ITEM_CHANGE.ITEM_CHANGE
    - NEW_VALUE_EXTERNAL: RFL_HX_NEW_VAL.NEW_VALUE_EXTERNAL
report.business_description:
Scope: main (main)
  Reads from scopes: cte:ReferralDenials, cte:AugDenialSla, cte:ReferralHistoryItemValues, cte:AugHistorySla
  Columns:
    - REFERRAL_ID: Referral Identifier
    - COVERAGE_ID: Coverage Identifier
    - ENTRY_DATE: Entry Date
    - START_DATE: Start Date
    - PRIORITY: Priority
    - REFERRAL_PROV_ID: Referral Provider Identifier
    - REFERRING_PROV_ID: Referring Provider Identifier
    - AUTH_REQUEST_ID: Authorization Request Identifier
    - AUG_RECEIVED_DTTM: Aug Received Date/Time
    - LOB_ID: Lob Identifier
    - RFL_TYPE_C: Rfl Type C
    - ITEM_CHANGE: Item Change
    - NEW_VALUE_EXTERNAL: New Value External
    - ACTION_DTTM: Action Date/Time
    - DENIAL_ROW: Denial Row
    - DENIAL_DATE: Denial Date
    - DENIAL_REASON: Denial Reason
    - RFI_ROW: Rfi Row
    - RFI_DATE: Rfi Date

Scope: cte:ReferralDenials (cte)
  Reads from tables: V_CCHP_AuthHeader_Fact, REFERRAL_HIST, REFERRAL_BED_DAY
  Filters:
    - [where] 0 = 0
    - [where] there exists a row where either (from REFERRAL_HIST, where New Rfl Status C = 5) or (from REFERRAL_BED_DAY, where Bed Day Status C = 2)
  Columns:
    - REFERRAL_ID: Referralid
    - BedDayAuthRequestId: Beddayauthrequestid
    - REFERRAL_EXT_ID: Externalid
    - COVERAGE_ID: Coverageid
    - ENTRY_DATE: Entrydate
    - START_DATE: Startdate
    - PRIORITY: Referralpriority
    - RFL_LOB_ID: Referrallineofbusinessid
    - REFERRAL_PROV_ID: Referralproviderid
    - REFERRING_PROV_ID: Referringproviderid
    - RFL_TYPE_C: Referraltypecategory
    - CustomEntryDateTime: Customentrydatetime

Scope: exists:0 (exists)
  Reads from tables: REFERRAL_HIST
  Filters:
    - [where] Referral Identifier = Referralid
    - [where] New Rfl Status C = 5
  Columns:
    - 1: 1

Scope: exists:1 (exists)
  Reads from tables: REFERRAL_BED_DAY
  Filters:
    - [where] Referralid = Referral Identifier
    - [where] Bed Day Status C = 2
  Columns:
    - 1: 1

Scope: cte:AugDenialSla (cte)
  Reads from tables: V_CCHP_UMAuthorizationRequest_Fact, REFERRAL, V_CCHP_UMAuthorizationRequestStatusHistory_Fact
  Filters:
    - [where] 0 = 0
    - [where] there exists a row where from V_CCHP_UMAuthorizationRequestStatusHistory_Fact, where Um Status C = 5
  Columns:
    - AUTH_REQUEST_ID: Authorization Request Identifier
    - AUTH_REQUEST_EXTERNAL_ID: Authorization Request External Identifier
    - REFERRAL_ID: Referral Identifier
    - COVERAGE_ID: Coverage Identifier
    - AUG_RECEIVED_DTTM: Aug Received Date/Time
    - START_DATE: first non-null of (Start Date, Start Date)
    - PRIORITY: Priority
    - LOB_ID: Lob Identifier
    - REFERRAL_PROV_ID: Referral Provider Identifier
    - REFERRING_PROV_ID: Referring Provider Identifier
    - RFL_TYPE_C: Rfl Type C

Scope: cte:AugHistorySla (cte)
  Reads from scopes: cte:AugDenialSla
  Reads from tables: V_CCHP_UMAuthorization_Fact, V_CCHP_UMAuthorizationHistory_Fact
  Filters:
    - [where] Um Status = 'Denied' or Um Status = 'Pending Review' and Um Pending Rsn = 'HP Request for Information'
  Columns:
    - UM_AUTH_REQUEST_ID: Um Authorization Request Identifier
    - CHANGED_BY_USER_ID: Changed By User Identifier
    - DENIAL_ROW: row number, for same Um Authorization Request Identifier, ordered by If of [Um Status = 'Denied', Changed Date/Time, '99991231']
    - DENIAL_DATE: If of [Um Status = 'Denied', Changed Date/Time, null]
    - DENIAL_REASON: If of [Um Status = 'Denied', Um Denied Rsn, null]
    - RFI_ROW: row number, for same Um Authorization Request Identifier, ordered by If of [Um Pending Rsn = 'HP Request for Information', Changed Date/Time, '99991231']
    - RFI_DATE: If of [Um Pending Rsn = 'HP Request for Information', Changed Date/Time, null]
    - UM_STATUS: Um Status
    - CHANGED_DTTM: Changed Date/Time
    - UM_DENIED_RSN: Um Denied Rsn
    - UM_PENDING_RSN: Um Pending Rsn

Scope: cte:ReferralHistoryItemValues (cte)
  Reads from scopes: cte:ReferralDenials
  Reads from tables: REFERRAL_HISTORY, RFL_HX_ACT, RFL_HX_ITEM_CHANGE, RFL_HX_NEW_VAL
  Filters:
    - [join_on] Referral Identifier = Referral Identifier and Group Line = Line
    - [join_on] Referral Identifier = Referral Identifier and Group Line = Group Line and Value Line = Value Line and Item Change in (50, 18007, 18003, 2081, 2080)
    - [join_on] Referral Identifier = Referral Identifier and Group Line = Group Line and Value Line = Value Line and Item Change = 18007 and New Val is not null or Item Change = 18003 and New Val = 1640000010 or Item Change = 50 and New Val = '5' or Item Change = 2081 and New Val = '2' or Item Change = 2080 and New Val is not null
  Columns:
    - REFERRAL_ID: Referral Identifier
    - HX_USER_ID: History User Identifier
    - ACTION_DTTM: Action Date/Time
    - GROUP_LINE: Group Line
    - ITEM_CHANGE: Item Change
    - NEW_VALUE_EXTERNAL: New Value External

filters.expression: EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM Clarity.dbo.REFERRAL_HIST AS RFLH WHERE RFLH.REFERRAL_ID = RFL.Referralid AND RFLH.NEW_RFL_STATUS_C = 5 UNION ALL SELECT 1 FROM Clarity.dbo.REFERRAL_BED_DAY AS RFLBD WHERE RFL.Referralid = RFLBD.REFERRAL_ID AND RFLBD.BED_DAY_STATUS_C = 2 )
filters.english: there exists a row where either (from REFERRAL_HIST, where New Rfl Status C = 5) or (from REFERRAL_BED_DAY, where Bed Day Status C = 2)

filters.expression: EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM CookClarity.Reporting.V_CCHP_UMAuthorizationRequestStatusHistory_Fact AS aughx WHERE aughx.AUTH_REQUEST_ID = aug.AUTH_REQUEST_ID AND aughx.UM_STATUS_C = 5 )
filters.english: there exists a row where from V_CCHP_UMAuthorizationRequestStatusHistory_Fact, where Um Status C = 5

columns.business_description: first non-null of (Start Date, Start Date)

filters.expression: authx.UM_STATUS = 'Denied' OR (authx.UM_STATUS = 'Pending Review' AND authx.UM_PENDING_RSN = 'HP Request for Information')
filters.english: Um Status = 'Denied' or Um Status = 'Pending Review' and Um Pending Rsn = 'HP Request for Information'

columns.technical_description: ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY aut.UM_AUTH_REQUEST_ID ORDER BY IIF(authx.UM_STATUS = 'Denied', authx.CHANGED_DTTM, '99991231')) AS [DENIAL_ROW]
columns.business_description: row number, for same Um Authorization Request Identifier, ordered by If of [Um Status = 'Denied', Changed Date/Time, '99991231']
If of [Um Status = 'Denied', Changed Date/Time, null]
If of [Um Status = 'Denied', Um Denied Rsn, null]

columns.technical_description: ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY aut.UM_AUTH_REQUEST_ID ORDER BY IIF(authx.UM_PENDING_RSN = 'HP Request for Information', authx.CHANGED_DTTM, '99991231')) AS [RFI_ROW]
columns.business_description: row number, for same Um Authorization Request Identifier, ordered by If of [Um Pending Rsn = 'HP Request for Information', Changed Date/Time, '99991231']

columns.technical_description: IIF(authx.UM_PENDING_RSN = 'HP Request for Information', authx.CHANGED_DTTM, NULL) AS [RFI_DATE]
columns.business_description: If of [Um Pending Rsn = 'HP Request for Information', Changed Date/Time, null]

filters.english: Referral Identifier = Referral Identifier and Group Line = Line

filters.expression: RFLHIC.REFERRAL_ID = RFLHA.REFERRAL_ID AND RFLHIC.GROUP_LINE = RFLHA.GROUP_LINE AND RFLHIC.VALUE_LINE = RFLHA.VALUE_LINE AND RFLHIC.ITEM_CHANGE IN (50 , 18007 , 18003 , 2081 , 2080 )
filters.english: Referral Identifier = Referral Identifier and Group Line = Group Line and Value Line = Value Line and Item Change in (50, 18007, 18003, 2081, 2080)

filters.expression: RFLHNV.REFERRAL_ID = RFLHA.REFERRAL_ID AND RFLHNV.GROUP_LINE = RFLHA.GROUP_LINE AND RFLHNV.VALUE_LINE = RFLHA.VALUE_LINE AND ((RFLHIC.ITEM_CHANGE = 18007 AND NOT RFLHNV.NEW_VAL IS NULL) OR (RFLHIC.ITEM_CHANGE = 18003 AND RFLHNV.NEW_VAL = 1640000010 ) OR (RFLHIC.ITEM_CHANGE = 50 AND RFLHNV.NEW_VAL = '5' ) OR (RFLHIC.ITEM_CHANGE = 2081 AND RFLHNV.NEW_VAL = '2' ) OR (RFLHIC.ITEM_CHANGE = 2080 AND NOT RFLHNV.NEW_VAL IS NULL))
filters.english: Referral Identifier = Referral Identifier and Group Line = Group Line and Value Line = Value Line and Item Change = 18007 and New Val is not null or Item Change = 18003 and New Val = 1640000010 or Item Change = 50 and New Val = '5' or Item Change = 2081 and New Val = '2' or Item Change = 2080 and New Val is not null

joins.on_expression: RFLHIC.REFERRAL_ID = RFLHA.REFERRAL_ID AND RFLHIC.GROUP_LINE = RFLHA.GROUP_LINE AND RFLHIC.VALUE_LINE = RFLHA.VALUE_LINE AND RFLHIC.ITEM_CHANGE IN (50 /* Referral Status */, 18007 /* Denial Reason */, 18003 /* Pending Reason */, 2081 /* Bed Day Status */, 2080 /* Bed Day Denied Reason */)

RFLHNV.REFERRAL_ID = RFLHA.REFERRAL_ID AND RFLHNV.GROUP_LINE = RFLHA.GROUP_LINE AND RFLHNV.VALUE_LINE = RFLHA.VALUE_LINE AND ((RFLHIC.ITEM_CHANGE = 18007 AND NOT RFLHNV.NEW_VAL IS NULL) OR (RFLHIC.ITEM_CHANGE = 18003 AND RFLHNV.NEW_VAL = 1640000010 /* Request for Information */) OR (RFLHIC.ITEM_CHANGE = 50 AND RFLHNV.NEW_VAL = '5' /* Denied */) OR (RFLHIC.ITEM_CHANGE = 2081 AND RFLHNV.NEW_VAL = '2' /* Denied */) OR (RFLHIC.ITEM_CHANGE = 2080 AND NOT RFLHNV.NEW_VAL IS NULL))
